error.signature: Gradle task assembleDebug failed with exit code 1

verdict.summary: Android build failed. Generic Gradle failure — the real error is further up in the log output.

dead_ends.action: Run flutter clean and retry without reading the log
dead_ends.why_fails: flutter clean rarely fixes Gradle errors. The real error is in the log above the exit code.

dead_ends.action: Delete the android/ folder and recreate with flutter create
dead_ends.why_fails: Destroys custom Android configurations (permissions, build flavors, signing)

workarounds.action: Scroll up in the log to find the actual error
workarounds.how: flutter build apk --verbose 2>&1 | less  # search for 'ERROR' or 'FAILURE'

workarounds.action: Run Gradle directly for better error output
Update Gradle wrapper and Android Gradle Plugin version
